prompt: A cinematic fantasy-realism night scene of a young man walking hand-in-hand with a glowing holographic woman on a wet city street after rain. The man is realistic, wearing an all-black layered outfit with a black hoodie, black jacket, black cargo pants, white sneakers, messy dark hair, light stubble, and round glasses. He has a calm, slightly emotional expression while looking toward the glowing woman. The woman is made entirely of warm golden light lines and neon outlines, appearing like a luminous human sketch or spirit figure. She has flowing hair, wears a long glowing coat, and carries a bouquet of vivid red roses that stand out against the dark environment. The street reflects orange streetlights and city bokeh lights, creating glossy reflections on the wet pavement. Moody urban atmosphere, romantic loneliness aesthetic, shallow depth of field, ultra-detailed cinematic lighting, soft glow effects, realistic textures, emotional storytelling, high contrast, photorealistic style, 8K, vertical composition.
